title: Robert’s Rebellion: The War That Ended a Dynasty #got #shorts
description: The Targaryens ruled for centuries—but one war ended it all. Robert’s Rebellion was not just a fight for power, but a turning point that reshaped Westeros forever. This is how the dynasty fell. #RobertsRebellion #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: The Targaryen dynasty did not end quietly—it was torn apart by a war that reshaped the entire world.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne cracking as war erupts around it, dark fantasy cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: For nearly three centuries, the Targaryens ruled Westeros, but their power had already begun to fade.
scenes.image_prompt: fading Targaryen banners over a weakening kingdom, somber tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Without dragons, their authority weakened, and loyalty turned into quiet resentment across the realm.
scenes.image_prompt: lords whispering in dark halls, tension building, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then came Aerys II, the Mad King, whose paranoia transformed fear into violence and cruelty.
scenes.image_prompt: Mad King glaring from the throne, wildfire glow around him, unstable energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: When he began executing nobles without reason, the realm realized the throne itself had become dangerous.
scenes.image_prompt: execution scene with burning banners and horrified witnesses, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The spark came from the disappearance of Lyanna Stark, a single event that ignited the entire kingdom.
scenes.image_prompt: Lyanna Stark riding into mist, mysterious and symbolic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Robert Baratheon rose in rebellion, joined by the Starks and Arryns, turning anger into open war.
scenes.image_prompt: Robert Baratheon raising his war hammer with armies behind him, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Battles spread across Westeros, each one breaking the power the Targaryens had built for centuries.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple battlefields across Westeros, chaos and war montage, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the Trident, everything changed, as two leaders met in a battle that would decide the future.
scenes.image_prompt: Robert and Rhaegar facing off on battlefield, dramatic tension, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Robert’s Rebellion did not just win a throne—it ended a dynasty and began a new age of uncertainty.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne standing alone as storm clouds gather, symbolic transition, vertical 1080x1920
